Trustpilot.review0Quote: I absolutely love TM! I feel so relaxed and grounded in a way I never thought possible. It's surprising that I can experience such a depth of relaxation beyond sleep. TM is so simple yet so profound that everyone can do it. It is my go to anchor daily.
Trustpilot.review1Quote: My only regret is that I didn't do it sooner. Totally life changing. I feel so peaceful and happy.
Trustpilot.review2Title: My daughter and I are very happy meditating daily
Trustpilot.review2Quote: My daughter and I are very happy meditating daily. It has giving us lots of insight and peace. We always look forward for our 2 daily meditations. The instructors are very dedicated and easy to understand.
Trustpilot.review3Title: Very professional, from emails to notifications
Trustpilot.review3Quote: Very professional, from emails to notifications to application. Very friendly, patient and experienced teachers. A lot of good information backed by science and research.
Trustpilot.review4Title: One of the best decisions in many years
Trustpilot.review4Quote: This has been one of the Best decisions I've made in many years. If you are in need of a foundational start to your day, this is for you.
Trustpilot.review5Quote: It's real. It's a way to live peacefully in time that belongs to you.
Trustpilot.review6Title: A definite change after just 3 weeks
Trustpilot.review6Quote: I have noticed a definite change in my anxiety levels only 3 weeks into starting TM.
Trustpilot.heading: What others are saying

Hero.badge: The only technique of its kind.

TrustBadges.badge4: No need to stop your thoughts

ForWhom.heading: Who is TM for?
ForWhom.item0Title: You're keeping it together — but inside you're always wound tight?
ForWhom.item0Description:
• You sleep badly, even though you're exhausted.
• You never really switch off — your mind just keeps running.
• Small things throw you off faster than you'd like.
• You're craving real rest, not just distraction.

TM gives you 20 minutes of deep stillness every day — and your nervous system starts to genuinely recover.
ForWhom.item1Title: You can feel the stress taking a toll on your body?
ForWhom.item1Description:
• Your blood pressure is too high — or you sense it soon will be.
• You wake up in the morning already drained.
• Headaches, tension, poor sleep — it's all connected.
• You want to make a change, but another health project sounds like more effort.

TM is the opposite of effort: sit for 20 minutes, close your eyes — and your body restores itself.
ForWhom.item2Title: You don't want promises — you want evidence?
ForWhom.item2Description:
• You're sceptical about meditation — and fair enough.
• You've tried things before that didn't deliver.
• You want to know: has this actually been studied? With real participants and control groups?
• Over 400 studies at universities including Harvard and Stanford: blood pressure, cortisol, sleep, heart health.

TM is the most researched meditation technique in the world — its effects are documented, not just claimed.
ForWhom.item3Title: Some days you feel empty — even when nothing's wrong?
ForWhom.item3Description:
• Getting out of bed is hard, even though nothing bad has happened.
• You function on the outside, but inside you don't have the energy for the things that matter to you.
• You feel like you're constantly holding yourself together — and you're not sure how much longer you can.
• Joy comes less often than it should.

TM isn't a substitute for professional support — but many people find: deeper calm, more ease, and a renewed sense of themselves.
ForWhom.item4Title: You want a practical path to inner fulfilment.
ForWhom.item4Description: The first stage of enlightenment is complete inner contentment and clarity — and it's already within each of us. We just need to know how to get there. TM gives you direct, effortless access. We experience our innermost nature — pure bliss. This happens during TM in deep stillness, both physical and mental. From there, the body can rest and release deeply accumulated stress. The result: we become more and more capable of living the immense joy within us — and unfolding it steadily in everyday life.

WhyTm.heading: What makes TM unique
WhyTm.subheading: Transcendental Meditation is fundamentally different from other techniques.
WhyTm.benefit0Short: Most meditation techniques demand focus or willpower. TM is different: the mind is allowed to settle completely naturally — without effort. That's why so many people find TM surprisingly easy to learn.
WhyTm.benefit0Expanded: Because the technique is effortless, the mind moves spontaneously towards quieter levels of thought. Meditation happens on its own — not through discipline. That makes TM accessible even to people who haven't had success with other techniques.
WhyTm.benefit1Title: Deeper than sleep — real rest for your body
WhyTm.benefit1Short: During TM, the body reaches a state of deep rest that studies show is deeper than sleep — while the mind stays awake and clear. In that stillness, the nervous system releases accumulated stress.
WhyTm.benefit1Expanded: This state is measurably different from relaxation, sleep, or concentration. Many people notice it directly: deep stillness, clarity, fresh energy — often before they're even aware of the difference it's making in daily life.
WhyTm.benefit2Short: Every person carries a reservoir of deep contentment within — a wellspring of joy that TM makes accessible. More inner satisfaction, less irritability in daily life.
WhyTm.benefit2Expanded: What philosophers, mystics, and sages have described for thousands of years becomes something concrete and lasting through TM. And it's not just experiential — it's scientifically measurable.
WhyTm.benefit3Short: Studies consistently show that regular practitioners respond more calmly under stress, make sharper decisions, and think more creatively. This isn't self-suggestion — it shows up in measurable brain activity.
WhyTm.benefit3Expanded: Research shows that TM improves coordination between different areas of the brain. This more integrated way of functioning has been documented in elite athletes, executives, and creatives who practise TM regularly.
WhyTm.benefit4Title: Release stress — even the deep-seated kind
WhyTm.benefit4Short: TM doesn't just ease acute stress — it helps dissolve pressure that's built up over years. Many people report less anxiety, better sleep, and greater resilience.
WhyTm.benefit4Expanded: TM has been studied for stress-related conditions and trauma recovery — including PTSD. The deep physiological rest it produces supports the body's natural self-regulation in ways other relaxation techniques simply can't match.
WhyTm.benefit5Short: Transcendental Meditation is the most researched meditation technique in the world. Areas of study include stress, heart health, brain function, performance, and resilience.
WhyTm.benefit5Expanded: Because TM is taught in a standardised way, it can be studied more rigorously than many other approaches. Research has been published in journals including the American Journal of Cardiology and the International Journal of Neuroscience.

HowItWorks.heading: How it works
HowItWorks.subheading: From curiosity to daily practice — in four simple steps.
HowItWorks.step0Description: Find out what TM is, how it differs from other techniques, and get all your questions answered. No commitment whatsoever.
HowItWorks.step1Description: The technique is taught one-on-one by a certified teacher — at your own pace, tailored to you. No prior experience needed.
HowItWorks.step2Description: 20 minutes, sitting comfortably, twice a day. No app, no guidance, no focusing — just effortless, independent practice.
HowItWorks.step3Description: With regular practice, the calm carries over into daily life: more energy, more clarity — even in stressful moments.

innereFreude.headline0: Inside you is an ocean of boundless joy.
innereFreude.subtitle: Dive into your own happiness — simply and reliably

schlaf.label: Sleep
schlaf.subtitle: TM gives your nervous system the deep rest that sleep alone often can't deliver.

fokus.label: Focus
fokus.headline1: Clarity can't be forced — it just happens.
fokus.subtitle: TM doesn't tidy up your mind — it lets order emerge on its own: sharper focus, quieter thoughts.

erschoepfung.label: Exhaustion
erschoepfung.headline0: Drained — even when you've done nothing?
erschoepfung.subtitle: TM connects you to genuine inner stillness — not as a technique, but as your natural state.

angst.label: Anxiety
angst.headline0: Ready for the restlessness to stop?
angst.subtitle: TM calms your nervous system from within — no willpower, no concentration needed.

WasAndereSagen.heading: What others say
WasAndereSagen.quote0: Transcendental Meditation as preparation. Because when the mind comes from a place of complete stillness, it has a different kind of focus.
WasAndereSagen.quote1: As a child and teenager I was constantly ill — a weakened immune system, frequent hospital stays, always exhausted. A year after I started meditating, that was over. My immune system became remarkably strong, and today, in later life, I'm healthier and more capable than I ever was in my youth.
WasAndereSagen.extendedQuote1: I notice a growing sense of development in every area of my life. Even in difficult situations I keep a clear head, and I don't feel myself ageing in any way. At 67 I have as much energy as I did at 40, and I can feel my consciousness continuing to expand.
WasAndereSagen.quote2: Meditation has changed my life. Nothing has opened my eyes the way Transcendental Meditation has. It makes me calm and happy, and brings quiet and peace to my rather chaotic life!
WasAndereSagen.quote3: TM is great for your health and genuinely fits into everyday life. Anyone who cares about their wellbeing and quality of life should meditate. Of all the forms of meditation I've tried, TM stands out for its simplicity and effectiveness.
WasAndereSagen.quote4: I haven't found anything more efficient or reliable for beating stress and fatigue — or for more joy, vitality, and creativity — than TM. It's the foundation of a fulfilling personal and professional life.
WasAndereSagen.extendedQuote4: As a special bonus, I experienced an opening inward — a discovery of my own self and my spiritual dimension. That kind of enrichment can't be bought. For over 42 years TM has been the quiet, dependable companion of my life, and it will continue to be.
WasAndereSagen.quote5: And it was a gift for life. Something you can come back to whenever you need it.
WasAndereSagen.extendedQuote5: In moments of madness, meditation has helped me find moments of serenity — and I would like to think that it would help provide young people a quiet haven in a not-so-quiet world.
